caption: Camila, this week still on? I have Thursday off, Valentina's at Diego's so I'm free by 8.
Yes omg I've been waiting for this. Your place or mine? I have that Malbec we didn't finish.
Mine. Lucia called this morning asking if you're coming too btw, she saw your IG story 😂
She's so nosy I love her. Tell her I'll bring croquetas.
Done. I get off at 7, had a wild day — German wedding group checked in with 40 guests, ningún inglés.
40 guests zero English?? How did you survive lol
I survived. Bilingüe y con estilo. See you at 8:30, don't be late like last time.
That was ONE time!! Fine, 8:30. Croquetas en mano I promise 🍷
